_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: Lentiviral-mediated shRNA knockdown of TAZ (shTAZ) reduces ALDH1A1 protein levels in cells; knockdown of ALDH1A1 was used as a positive control
details: Used as positive control for ALDH1A1 knockdown experiments in human schwannoma cells
